item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thank you!

Its one of those good ideas but given the theme of the Jamcon, as long and over the top as possibility was the idea. Trying to big this ultimately harmless thing up as something dangerous that requires excessive containment procedures

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: A simple entertaining read. I am not much of an expert, but I suggest you shorten the containment procedures a little. Anyway, deserves a +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I was in one of my lurking periods last year and never bore witness to the madness of Jamcon itself. And then I heard it was returning. I iffed, I uffed, but in the end, I went in full on into Jamcon. I will now promptly not look at this article for a day because the bloody stress of it will probably kill me

This SCP is actually based on a hella obscure little factoid: The term for Tengu originates from China, where it referred to 'Celestial Dogs' that were a bit of a mish-mash of meteor sightings and mythical beings.

Extra special thanks to DrChandra for a last minute review on this
